title: Ramky Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Ramky Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
